Full planning permission for the installation of a temporary Christmas Market within the Broadmead pedestrian area in front of Cabot Circus Shopping Centre. The Market will be open on the 06.11.2026 and run until the 23.12.2026. The setup times are from the 25.10.2026 until the 05.11.2026, take down from the 24.12.2026 until the 30.12.2026. The Christmas Market will include food and beverages alongside traditional gifts and craft stalls. Opening times are from Monday to Sundays 10am till 8pm, food and beverage stalls until 10pm.
